goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'magdalene college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'ely' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:45' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called magdalene college
Make sure you get phone number and attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from ely and should leave on monday
The train should arrive by 11:45 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and price
